post.description: Authenticates a user with login and password and returns a JWT access token.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing fields

post.description: Verifies the Bearer token sent in the Authorization header.

put.description: Admin only. Sets balance to the given value.

parameters.description: card_number, balance, is_blocked, owner_name, optional key_id
parameters.name: request

put.description: Admin only. Updates balance, block flag, owner, and key link.

post.description: Creates a terminal. Admin JWT required (is_admin=1).

delete.description: Deletes a terminal by id. Admin JWT required.

get.description: Returns a single terminal by numeric id.

put.description: Updates a terminal by id. Admin JWT required.

post.description: Processes a withdraw or deposit operation for a card at a terminal.

parameters.description: card_number, terminal_serial_number, amount, operation (withdraw or deposit)
parameters.name: request

post.description: Admin only. Records amount for a card at a terminal.

get.description: Returns all user records (includes password hash fields as stored).

post.description: Admin only. Expects pre-hashed password in password_hash.
